name: Rosemary
description: Have you ever noticed that rosemary will grow nearly anywhere, in nearly any environment? And it adds great taste to whatever it's combined with. That's one attractive, tough and versatile ingredient. Similarities to our Rosemary bed are absolutely striking. A platform bed with sturdy support, storage space below, and a stylish rattan headboard. The Rosemary Bed is a dual system frame using universal bed rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. Does not require a box spring.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood sourced from managed rubber tree plantations; certified renewable resource

name: Bali
description: The Bali futon frame offers a traditional slatted arm design that continues down the arm to encapsulate the sides. This frame is available with the Nesting Body Classic Design that features three positions: sofa, reclined, and bed. The arm is 2-1/2 inches wide and 23.6 inches tall, featuring a shutter style with a double row of 7 slats separated by a middle wooden piece.

sustainability.materialSource: Quality solid hardwoods with premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes

note: 12% ocean freight surcharge applies. Packaged in 2 cartons.

name: Flagstaff
description: The Flagstaff is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses are available in retail stores only and feature premium foam construction that provides resiliency and comfort, is significantly lighter weight, and does not attract moisture and mildew.
note: Retail store exclusive - limited online information available

name: Chandler
description: The Chandler is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses are available in retail stores only and feature premium foam construction. Similar models in the line range from $479-$699 depending on size.
note: Retail store exclusive - limited online information available

name: Pagoda
description: The Pagoda Futon Frame utilizes Wall Hugger technology that allows you to easily convert the frame from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Made from plantation grown rubberwood with a beautiful black walnut finish. Maximum weight capacity of 500 lbs (2 people, 250 lbs each).

name: Pulsar
description: The Pulsar is a premium memory foam futon mattress featuring a Pressurized Foam System designed to significantly reduce the degree of compression. The top layer is 3 inches of body-sensoring, pressure-reducing 3 lb. high-density viscoelastic foam. Non-Flip design with the Burlington fabric (white) always on top. Offers Medium-Soft comfort level. Non-toxic fire retardant barrier. CertiPUR-US certified foam.

dimensions.note: 10.5 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border

sustainability.materialSource: CertiPUR-US certified foam; non-toxic fire retardant (FR) barrier with Flame Retardant Rayon for 16 CFR Part 1633 compliance

careGuide: Non-flip design. Burlington fabric (white) always on top. Visco Memory Foam is just underneath the cover.

construction.baseLayer: 4.5 inches blend of convoluted 2 and 2.5 lb foam
construction.fabric: 100% polyester (cream) on sides and bottom; Polyester/Polypropylene blend on top

name: Center Legs
description: Center support legs for futon and platform bed frames. Includes two center support legs and 8 wood screws. Available in three height options: 11-inch legs for 12-inch optional leg height, 14-inch legs for standard 15-inch platform height, and 17-inch legs for taller configurations.

name: Murphy Cabinet Express
description: The Murphy Express is the most compact cabinet bed yet -- a sleek solution for rooms where space is at a premium. Transforms from a handsome sideboard into a comfortable bed in under 60 seconds with a folded footprint of just 10 square feet. No assembly required. Mattress included, packed inside the cabinet. Features built-in reading light, dual power/USB ports, and LED lamp. Covered by US Patents #10,888,170.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid rubberwood with hand-picked wood featuring unique rustic grain

name: Tamarind
description: The Tamarind Bed features a dual system using universal rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. This frame does not require the use of a box spring underneath your mattress of choice. The platform is adjustable to two heights, either 15 inches or 12 inches from floor to top of slats.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

name: Haley 110
description: A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester. 8-inch thickness (14 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border). 9 inches of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great. A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture. Designed for everyday use with 10-12+ year durability.

dimensions.note: 14 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border

sustainability.materialSource: Highly resilient foam and polyester construction

construction.foam: 9 inches of minimum 2.0 lb density foam
construction.fabric: 7.5 oz twill fabric with 100% polyester cover
construction.finishing: Machine tufting, tape edge closing process

name: Studio Frame
description: The Studio frame is a no-frills approach for a couch that can quickly and effortlessly be converted to a bed. Features four adjustable positions as a couch with a set of sturdy wheels in the back, making it easy to move. Simple and affordable, a popular choice for any casual setting that fits in with any urban decor. The decks lock together with wood dowels and sit ten inches above floor in bed position.

sustainability.materialSource: Tulip Poplar (solid poplar hardwood), unfinished, eco-friendly, chemical-free

name: Ruskin
description: The Ruskin Futon Frame is manufactured using quality solid hardwoods with a finishing process utilizing premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes. Features easy conversion with three comfort positions (sofa, recline, bed) and sofa height seating position. Available with MoonGlider or Classic body options.

sustainability.materialSource: Quality solid hardwoods with premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes

note: 17% ocean freight surcharge applies. Packaged in 2 cartons.

name: Nutmeg Platform Bed
description: The Nutmeg Bed is a great choice for the contemporary room. Its flared legs and curved-slat styling is a current classic reminiscent of a sleigh. Available as K-Series (high platform) or P-Series (low platform) models. Uses universal bed rails. Does not require a box spring.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

name: Northampton
description: The Northampton is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses feature premium foam construction that provides resiliency and comfort, is significantly lighter weight, and does not attract moisture and mildew. Available in retail stores only.
note: Retail store exclusive - limited online information available

name: Ranchero Murphy Cabinet Bed
description: Converts from a handsome cabinet to a comfortable bed in less than a minute and takes up less than 10 square feet of floor space when closed. Supports 500 lbs -- great for couples and extra guests. Features built-in electrical outlets and USB ports. Hand-painted and individually retouched or distressed depending on the finish, resulting in a unique item each time. Comes complete with folding trays. Includes 6-inch tri-fold premium gel memory foam mattress.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid hardwood construction with hand-applied finish

features: 6-inch tri-fold gel memory foam mattress included
